intro.text: We build your landing page in Webflow, a professional website builder. This guide covers the full setup from creating your account through to connecting your custom domain. You won't need to do everything at once — we'll let you know when it's time for each part.
bullets: We build your landing page inside your Webflow account so you own it
The free Starter plan is all you need to get started
We handle the build, tracking, and deployment once access is set up
intro.helpText: If you have any troubles at any step, feel free to email Tyce, or book a meeting directly

sections.heading: Part 1: Create Your Free Account
sections.description: This is the first step. It takes about 2 minutes and doesn't require a credit card.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Go to webflow.com/signup
steps.description: You can sign up with Google (fastest) or enter your work email address and click Continue.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Complete the signup form
steps.description: Fill in your name and create a password. Then verify your email address by clicking the link Webflow sends you.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Stay on the free Starter plan
steps.description: You don't need to upgrade or enter any payment details. The free Starter plan is all we need to get started. If prompted to choose a plan, select "Starter" (Free).

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Let us know your account is ready
steps.description: That's it for this part. We'll be in touch when it's time for the next step.

sections.heading: Part 2: Invite Us to Your Workspace
sections.description: We'll ask you to do this once we're ready to transfer the site we've built into your account. No need to action this until we reach out.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Go to your workspace settings
steps.description: Click "All Sites" to make sure you're in your workspace view (not inside a specific site).

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Find "Team" in the sidebar
steps.description: Under Settings in the left sidebar, click "Team".

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Invite us as guests
steps.description: Under "Agency or Freelancer Guests", click "Invite Guest" and add both email addresses below. Set permissions to Site Manager for both.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Let us know once we're invited
steps.description: We'll transfer the site into your workspace and be in touch about the next step.

sections.heading: Part 3: Add a Site Plan
sections.description: Once we've transferred the site into your workspace, you'll need a paid site plan so we can publish to your custom domain. We'll send you a direct link when it's time.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Click the billing link we send you
steps.description: We'll send you a direct link to the billing page. No need to find it yourself.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Add the "Basic" site plan ($18 USD/month)
steps.description: This is the minimum plan needed to publish on a custom domain. Select the Basic plan and complete payment.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Let us know once the plan is active
steps.description: We'll then move to the final part: connecting your custom domain.

sections.heading: Part 4: Connect Your Custom Domain
sections.description: This is the final step. Once the site plan is active, we'll ask you to connect your subdomain (e.g. try.yourdomain.com). It takes about 2 minutes and is handled through a tool called Entri which connects to your DNS provider automatically.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Navigate to the publishing area for your Webflow site
bullets: A gear icon will appear in the top right corner, click it
Then select "Publishing" in the left hand menu bar

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Click "add a custom domain" then "quick connect subdomain"

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: The "Entri" modal will pop up. Click "Continue"

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Enter your subdomain and domain
steps.description: Enter the subdomain we agreed on (e.g. "try") in the subdomain field, and your domain (e.g. "yourdomain.com") in the domain field.

steps.label: Step 5
steps.title: Click "Authorize with [Your DNS Provider]"
steps.description: This will ask you to log in to your DNS provider (e.g. Cloudflare, GoDaddy). It will then add the required records automatically.

steps.label: Step 6 (Final Step)
steps.title: Let us know once it's done
steps.description: We'll verify everything is connected correctly and complete the final checks. You're all set!
